creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Trond.Endrestol from comment #12)
Looking good:
$ julia

  (_)     | (_) (_)    |
   _ _   _| |_  __ _   |  Type "?" for help, "]?" for Pkg help.
  | | | | | | |/ _` |  |
  | | |_| | | | (_| |  |  Version 1.0.0 (2018-08-08)
 _/ |\__'_|_|_|\__'_|  |  FreeBSD ports lang/julia build
|__/                   |

julia> 2+2
4

julia> ^D
$
